---
title: "test_uplink.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/unit/test_uplink.py"
loc: 80
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.40
style_score: 3.56
intel_score: 7.40
overall_score: 5.92
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating make_api_error, mock_spinner. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [types](file://types)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [google.genai.errors](file://google.genai.errors)

### Exports
- `make_api_error`
- `mock_spinner`
- `wrapper`
- `mock_spinner_impl`
- `_force_sdk_available`
- `test_uplink_token_flood_truncation`
- `test_uplink_api_severance_retry`
- `test_uplink_fatal_exhaustion`
